description_long: This shopping cart features a robust, open wireframe basket constructed from orange and blue metal tubing, providing ample space for groceries or goods. The basket is supported by a sturdy blue lower frame, which also serves as a platform for additional items. Four black wheels are attached to the base, allowing for smooth maneuverability across urban surfaces. The handlebar is ergonomically designed, coated in orange, and positioned at the rear for easy pushing. A white sign with the word 'SHOP' in red is affixed to the front, adding a touch of branding. The cart includes a small, blue child seat near the handle, complete with a foldable design for convenience.
description: A metal wireframe shopping cart with orange and blue coloring, four wheels, a rear handlebar, and a front 'SHOP' sign. It features a foldable child seat and a spacious basket for carrying items.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange wire basket, blue lower frame, and all four wheels, with the handlebar and child seat visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the 'SHOP' sign, the open grid basket, and the alignment of the wheels beneath the cart.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the basket, blue frame, and handlebar, with the child seat partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handlebar, child seat, and the open structure of the basket, with the wheels aligned below.
attribute_wire_basket_pattern: Rectangular grid pattern with evenly spaced, thick metal wires forming a rigid, open mesh structure; wires are arranged horizontally and vertically with moderate spacing.
attribute_handlebar_design: Straight, tubular metal handlebar coated in orange, with a smooth grip surface and no visible ergonomic padding or branding.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Four medium-sized black wheels, two at the front and two at the rear, likely all swivel for maneuverability; evenly spaced at the corners of the lower frame.
attribute_child_seat_presence: present; small blue foldable seat near the handle, integrated into the basket with a simple design and no visible safety belt.
attribute_store_branding: White rectangular sign with red 'SHOP' text attached to the front of the basket; no other visible branding elements.
